'''Unlimited Horizons Incorporated''', also known as '''Unlimited Horizons Inc.''' or '''UHI''', was a company on [[Kalla VII]] which controlled most of the [[pallodenite]] reserves in the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]]. The company also owned the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] ''[[Amanda's Toy II]]'', which was one of many [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] tracked near the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Teyr/Legends|Teyr]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].

==Appearances==
